LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF B.P.M.P. FAIMLY PARTNERS, LLC, MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, STAY LITIGATION AND AWARD ATTORNEYS' FEES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION GRANTED PURSUANT TO COUNSELS' AGREEMENT. STAY OF LITIGATION WILL COMMENCE UPON RESOLUTION OF THE PENDING ATTACHMENT MOTION. MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. PLAINTIFF FILED ITS MOTION PREMATURELY IN VIEW OF ATTORNEY'S CORRESPONDENCE. NO SHOWING THAT ATTORNEY FEES NECESSARY OR REASONABLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
ORDER GRANTING B.P.M.P FAMILY PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, STAY LITIGATION

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF B.P.M.P FAMILY PARTNERS, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED. $10,000.00 UNDERTAKING REQUIRED FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT. DEFENDANT MAY APPLY FOR MODIFICATION UPON SHOWING OF ALTERNATE SECURITY, EXCESSIVE ATTACHMENT, ETC. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-11-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
DANIEL K. SLAUGHTER, ESQ., (415)955-5037 x237, FOR Plaintiff/MOVING PARTY, B.P.M.P Family Partners, LLC
RILEY F. HURD, III, ESQ., (415)453-9433, FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, Plaintiff B.P.M.P Family Partners, LLC's Application for right to attach order and issuance of writ of attachment IS GRANTED. $10,000.00 UNDERTAKING REQUIRED FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT. DEFENDANT MAY APPLY FOR MODIFICATION UPON SHOWING OF ALTERNATE SECURITY, EXCESSIVE ATTACHMENT, ETC. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported. (610/PS)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration, Stay Litigation And Award Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF B.P.M.P. FAIMLY PARTNERS, LLC, Motion To Compel Arbitration, Stay Litigation And Award Attorneys' Fees. Appearances: Daniel K. Slaughter, Esq. of Stein & Lubin LLP (415) 955-5037 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Riley F. Hurd III, of Ragghianti/Freitas LLP (415) 453-9433 appearing for Hunter/Summertime. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to compel arbitration and stay litigation granted pursuant to counsels' agreement. Stay of litigation will commence upon resolution of the pending attachment motion. Motion for attorney fees denied. Plaintiff filed its motion prematurely in view of attorney's correspondence. No showing that attorney fees necessary or reasonable. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
